_comment: Operator-maintained designated-vessel watchlist. Ariadne cross-matches each live vessel against these by IMO (durable, survives MMSI/flag changes) and falls back to MMSI. This file is reference data only — Ariadne ships it EMPTY. Populate `entries` from authoritative designations (e.g. OFAC SDN, OFSI, EU consolidated list); every match should be verifiable against `source`. A match is an exposure signal, not an adjudication. Re-read on each /api/integrity request, so edits take effect without a restart.

_schema.mmsi: string|number — 9-digit MMSI (fallback key; either imo or mmsi is required)
_schema.name: string — vessel name at time of listing (display only)
_schema.listed: string — ISO date the vessel was designated

_example.name: EXAMPLE VESSEL — replace; not a real designation
_example.note: Illustrative schema row. Remove before use.
